params.name: Garden Aroma
params.description: Chan-hee, with her unique craftsmanship, refines the pure essence of nature's flowers. The name evokes visions of a lush garden, where vibrant greenery and scents transport you to a springtime oasis. Each layer of fragrance unfolds gradually, cleansing and uplifting your soul with the sweet aroma.
